title: Supplemental insurance
description: Practice understanding of supplemental insurance and extended warranties.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select the true statement about supplemental insurance.**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Supplemental insurance always replaces your main insurance plan.
Supplemental insurance can help cover specific costs only in specific scenarios.
Supplemental insurance is required by law for everyone.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is a true statement about why someone might want supplemental insurance?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: to replace their existing insurance policy with a new one
to cover expenses that their other insurance policy does not cover
to avoid getting a fine for not having one

assessment_items.question_content:
**Select the true statement about supplemental insurance.**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Supplemental insurance covers a large variety of expenses and scenarios related to what is insured.
Supplemental insurance provides extra coverage or benefits in addition to your main insurance policy
Supplemental insurance is automatically included in most purchases.

assessment_items.question_content:
You are buying a house. The company lending you money wants to know if you want to buy insurance. If you die, this insurance will pay off your house for you.

**What is this type of insurance called?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You just bought a new laptop and the store offers you a plan that covers the cost of repairs for a longer period than the manufacturer's warranty.

**What is this type of insurance called?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

You have a personal loan and a credit card balance. If you die, there is an insurance that will pay off these debts for you.

**What is this type of insurance called?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these is a *benefit* of having debt cancellation coverage?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It covers your loan payments if you can't make them due to an unexpected event.
It reduces the interest rate on your loans.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a *benefit* of having an extended warranty?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It covers the cost of repairs for a longer period of time.
It gives you a discount on future purchases.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a *benefit* of having car loan pay off insurance?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It covers the remaining balance on your car loan if your car is totaled or stolen.
It pays for a rental car if your car is being repaired after an accident.
It lowers your car insurance premiums.

assessment_items.question_content:
Supplemental insurance isn't always necessary, especially if you have other insurance that covers the same things.

**Mortgage protection insurance is not needed if you have which of the following insurances?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Supplemental insurance isn't always necessary, especially if you have other insurance that covers the same things.

**Accidental death and dismemberment insurance is not needed if you have which of the following insurances?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Supplemental insurance isn't always necessary, especially if you have other insurance that covers the same things.

**Credit life coverage is not needed if you have which of the following insurances?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
